; LOAD ingatellentSettings.qmd
AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7712892662059645]] [[180922.180921]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[7713531976371484]]
LOCATE AFTER [[8397993708429497603]]#[[7713694313857736]]
INSERT {
	property ~&6503679477&~ takingScreenshot: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot
    ~&14427530104363229979&~ {
    	~&5972374&~: screenshotHandler
	~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
	~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
	~&233748328658231&~: ~&7713531976371484&~.takingScreenshot
        property ~&214622605608&~ overlayColor: ~&5971598&~.rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 
	property ~&214620122227&~ ~&10742505294233311581&~: ~&10742505294233311581&~
	property ~&6504243191&~ ~&9804025380981016&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0,0,screenshotHandler.~&214646099849&~,screenshotHandler.~&7082729686082&~)

        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
            ~&180993&~: 0; ~&180994&~: 0; ~&214646099849&~: screenshotHandler.~&214646099849&~; ~&7082729686082&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180994&~
            ~&214622605608&~: screenshotHandler.overlayColor
	    ~&254494525842443467&~ {
	    	~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot = ~&214625660372&~
	    }
        }
        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
            ~&180993&~: 0; ~&180994&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180994&~ + screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&7082729686082&~
            ~&214646099849&~: screenshotHandler.~&214646099849&~; ~&7082729686082&~: screenshotHandler.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&180994&~
            ~&214622605608&~: screenshotHandler.overlayColor
	    ~&254494525842443467&~ {
	    	~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot = ~&214625660372&~
	    }
        }
        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
            ~&180993&~: 0; ~&180994&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180994&~
            ~&214646099849&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180993&~; ~&7082729686082&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&7082729686082&~
            ~&214622605608&~: screenshotHandler.overlayColor
	    ~&254494525842443467&~ {
	    	~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot = ~&214625660372&~
	    }
        }
        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
            ~&180993&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180993&~ + screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&214646099849&~; ~&180994&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180994&~
            ~&214646099849&~: screenshotHandler.~&214646099849&~ - ~&180993&~; ~&7082729686082&~: screenshotHandler.~&10742505294233311581&~.~&7082729686082&~
            ~&214622605608&~: screenshotHandler.overlayColor
	    ~&254494525842443467&~ {
	    	~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot = ~&214625660372&~
	    }
        }
    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: ~&10742505294233311581&~
	property ~&7082585429636&~ savedX: ~&7713531976371484&~.~&214646099849&~/2 - 200
	property ~&7082585429636&~ savedY: ~&7713531976371484&~.~&7082729686082&~/2 - 100
        property ~&7082585429636&~ savedWidth: 400
	property ~&7082585429636&~ savedHeight : 200
	property ~&6503679477&~ fullScreen: ~&214625660372&~
	~&214646099849&~: fullScreen ? screenshotHandler.~&214646099849&~ : savedWidth
	~&7082729686082&~: fullScreen ? screenshotHandler.~&7082729686082&~ : savedHeight
	~&180993&~: fullScreen ? 0 : savedX
	~&180994&~: fullScreen ? 0 : savedY
	~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~
        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 3

        property ~&6504243117&~ ~&233736698734376&~: 40

       ~&254494525842443467&~ {
           ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
	   ~&6503754151&~.~&7083194890448&~: ~&10742505294233311581&~.fullScreen ? ~&254550717068498203&~ : ~&10742505294233311581&~
           ~&6503754151&~.axis: ~&6502604167&~.XAndYAxis
onDoubleClicked: {
	 ~&10742505294233311581&~.fullScreen = !~&10742505294233311581&~.fullScreen
 }
       }
 

        CornerHandle {
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
            onHandleDragged: (~&7082573266219&~, ~&7082573266220&~) => {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth - ~&7082573266219&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedX += ~&7082573266219&~
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth -= ~&7082573266219&~
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight - ~&7082573266220&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedY += ~&7082573266220&~
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight -= ~&7082573266220&~
                }
            }
        }

        CornerHandle {
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
            onHandleDragged: (~&7082573266219&~, ~&7082573266220&~) => {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth + ~&7082573266219&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth += ~&7082573266219&~
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight - ~&7082573266220&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedY += ~&7082573266220&~
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight -= ~&7082573266220&~
                }
            }
        }

        CornerHandle {
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
            onHandleDragged: (~&7082573266219&~, ~&7082573266220&~) => {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth - ~&7082573266219&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedX += ~&7082573266219&~
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth -= ~&7082573266219&~
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight + ~&7082573266220&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight += ~&7082573266220&~
                }
            }
        }

        CornerHandle {
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
            onHandleDragged: (~&7082573266219&~, ~&7082573266220&~) => {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth + ~&7082573266219&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedWidth += ~&7082573266219&~
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight + ~&7082573266220&~ > ~&10742505294233311581&~.~&233736698734376&~) {
                    ~&10742505294233311581&~.savedHeight += ~&7082573266220&~
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
~&12395602925408354507&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: screenshotContextMenu

	~&8399923448980225585&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0,0,~&7713531976371484&~.~&214646099849&~,~&7713531976371484&~.~&7082729686082&~)
        ~&9804025380981016&~: screenshotHandler.~&9804025380981016&~
	~&10742505294233311581&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180993&~,~&10742505294233311581&~.~&180994&~,~&10742505294233311581&~.~&214646099849&~,~&10742505294233311581&~.~&7082729686082&~)

        ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&8399878573055752961&~: "screenshotHandlerMenu"

        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
            ~&5972374&~: screenshotButton
            ~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
            ~&6504337259&~: screenshotContextMenu.~&6504337259&~
            ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/screenshot"
            ~&254542236275632405&~: screenshotHandler.takeScreenshot()
        }

}



    component CornerHandle : ~&254501108490678590&~ {
    	~&233726547792244&~: !~&10742505294233311581&~.fullScreen
	~&233748328658231&~: ~&233726547792244&~
        ~&5972374&~: ~&7082725118933&~
        ~&214646099849&~: 80; ~&7082729686082&~: 80
	~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
        ~&233721384511543&~.~&233736391113274&~: -40

	    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
        ~&214646099849&~: 30
        ~&7082729686082&~: 30
        ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~
        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 3
    }

        signal handleDragged(~&6504243117&~ ~&7082573266219&~, ~&6504243117&~ ~&7082573266220&~)

        ~&254494525842443467&~ {
            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
            ~&6503754151&~.~&7083194890448&~: ~&7082725118933&~

            ~&12756630929064311461&~: (~&214634474738&~) => {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233740915843711&~) {
                    handleDragged(~&214634474738&~.~&180993&~, ~&214634474738&~.~&180994&~)
                }
            }
        }
    }
	XoviMessageBroker {
                ~&5972374&~: screenshotBroker
            }
	function takeScreenshot()
	{
	~&214622607920&~ rotVal = ~&495572996767745525&~.~&495572996767745525&~ / 90;
	~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot = ~&214625660372&~;
	
~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = screenshotBroker.sendSimpleSignal("takeScreenshot", `/home/root/screenshots,500,${rotVal},${selectionRect.x},${selectionRect.y},${selectionRect.x + selectionRect.width},${selectionRect.y+selectionRect.height}`);
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7083121414760&~ === "success") {
		~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Screenshot thread started (0.5 sec delay)");
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Screenshot failed to start");
                }
	}
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
SLOT ingatellentScreenshotButton
    INSERT {
        ~&10845406345867313529&~ {
            ~&5972374&~: ingatellentScreenshotButton
            ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&214625660372&~
            ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/screenshot"
            ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~

            property ~&6503679477&~ wasLongPress: ~&214625660372&~

            XoviMessageBroker {
                ~&5972374&~: ingatellentScreenshotBroker
            }

            ~&214604601930&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: ingatellentCloseTimer
                ~&7713147298280334&~: 5
                ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&2766288418351025740&~) {
                        ~&2766288418351025740&~.~&214622501183&~(~&"13710581283192580798&~);
                    }
                }
            }

            ~&383135108587212173&~: {
                ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Screenshot button long press!");
                wasLongPress = ~&6504329801&~;
	        ~&7713561545874130&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = ingatellentScreenshotBroker.sendSimpleSignal("takeScreenshot", "/home/root/screenshots,100");
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7083121414760&~ === "success") {
                    ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Screenshot thread started (100ms sec delay)");
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Screenshot failed to start");
                }
                ingatellentCloseTimer.~&214641748151&~();
            }

            ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (!wasLongPress) {
                    ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Screenshot button clicked!");
                    ~&7713561545874130&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
		    ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.takingScreenshot = ~&6504329801&~;
                    ingatellentCloseTimer.~&214641748151&~();
                }
                wasLongPress = ~&214625660372&~;
            }
        }
    }
END SLOT

AFFECT [[11542018640809782132]]
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.7082069304737]] [[180923.180921]]
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7713561876955258]] [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker [[180923.180921]]

    TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[7712155293725601]]
        INSERT SLOT ingatellentScreenshotButton
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[10936356414964521612]]
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.7082069304737]] [[180923.180921]]
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7713561876955258]] [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker [[180923.180921]]

    TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[7712155293725601]]
        INSERT SLOT ingatellentScreenshotButton
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
INSERT {
		property ~&6503679477&~ takingScreenshot: ~&214625660372&~
}
END SLOT
